intro: Mnemion rafinesquei, also known as Rafinesque's Mnemion or Western Mnemion, is a flowering plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in relieving digestive issues and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Mnemion rafinesquei include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Mnemion rafinesquei include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
